## Meeting Purpose

[Reconnect with Yousef Hamade from growthx.ai to discuss potential Vanta implementation for SOC 2 compliance.](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai is rapidly growing (48 employees) and aiming for SOC 2 compliance by Q4](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [Yousef is building entire IT/security program; Vanta vs. Drata decision pending](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Cost is primary factor; Liam willing to be flexible on pricing](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Decision timeline: 30-45 days, with CEO presentation in \~2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

## Topics

### growthx.ai Company Overview

  - [Formed 7-8 months ago, spun out as separate entity 3 months ago](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Series A funding secured, already profitable](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Rapid growth: 20+ to 48 employees since January](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [CEO (Marcel) new to cybersecurity aspects](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Setting up office space in Bay Area](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)

### Current IT/Security Situation

  - [Yousef consulting, handling all IT/security](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Implementing foundational elements: anti-malware, MDM, SSO, laptop procurement](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Recently onboarded new HRIS platform](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Employee benefits starting tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)

### SOC 2 Compliance Goals

  - [Target: End of year/Q4 for SOC 2 compliance](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [Building entire program SOC 2 is based on](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Evaluating Vanta vs. Drata for compliance tool](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)

### Vanta Consideration

  - [Yousef familiar with Vanta from previous use](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
  - [Prefers Vanta's API structure (despite some GraphQL concerns)](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [Vanta seen as leader with 10,000+ customers, including major AI companies](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [Deeper integrations than competitors (3x more)](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)

### Decision Factors

  - [Primary factor: Cost (CEO unfamiliar with IT/security budgeting)](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Functionality and familiarity with Vanta are positives](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Liam open to flexible/custom pricing to meet budget needs](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)

### Timeline and Next Steps

  - [CEO presentation in \~2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Overall decision in 30-45 days](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
  - [Yousef to review pricing from Eliza, reach out if needed](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [Reconnect with Liam in 2 weeks (Calendly link provided)](https://fathom.video/share/QsWm3M21eEyxCK5xDqbhzidueTNnXASs?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
